message:
feat(tests): Add golden corpus regression harness for pattern detection

- Add tests/corpus/ directory with txt+expect.json fixtures for all agents
- Add tests/pattern_corpus.rs with automated corpus validation
- Cleanup debug output in patterns.rs, formatting fixes
- Various collaborative improvements to core modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,7 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled", "backup", "functions"] }
 aho-corasick = "1.1"
 memchr = "2.7"
 fancy-regex = "0.14"
+regex = "1.10"
 
 # Config
 toml = "0.8"

@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 aho-corasick.workspace = true
 memchr.workspace = true
 fancy-regex.workspace = true
+regex.workspace = true
 
 # Database
 rusqlite.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# Pattern Corpus Fixtures
+
+This folder contains golden corpus fixtures for the pattern engine.
+
+Each fixture is a pair of files:
+- <name>.txt: input text
+- <name>.expect.json: expected detections (JSON array)
+
+How to add a fixture
+1) Capture real output (redacted if needed).
+2) Save it as tests/corpus/<agent>/<name>.txt.
+3) Run the corpus test to see the diff.
+4) Update the rule/pack or expected JSON until green.
+
+Guidelines
+- Keep inputs small and focused.
+- Prefer one scenario per file unless a combined scenario is clearer.
+- Avoid secrets in fixtures.
